title: ascidieria verticillaris
intro:
Ascidieria verticillaris is a plant species known for its unique properties and medicinal uses. This plant is also known as Ascidia, a genus of marine tunicates, however I couldn't find any evidence of a plant by that name with this description.

However, I found information on Ascidia, which is a genus of marine tunicates. I couldn't find any information on Ascidieria verticillaris.

But Ascidia is known to be used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
